sql_array: CREATE TABLE team_stats (`team` String, `player` String, `score` UInt32) Engine = Memory;
INSERT INTO team_stats VALUES ('Team Alpha', 'Alice', 500), ('Team Alpha', 'Bob', 700), ('Team Beta', 'Charlie', 600);
SELECT player, score, rank() OVER (PARTITION BY team ORDER BY score DESC) AS player_rank FROM team_stats;
SELECT team, AVG(score) AS average_score, rank() OVER (ORDER BY AVG(score) DESC) AS team_rank FROM team_stats GROUP BY team;
